title: Glossary term
description: A living glossary entry, auto-extended when cards use undefined jargon. Lives in the shared pool at content/shared/glossary/{id}.json since the registry-model pivot: a glossary term may be referenced by cards from more than one jurisdiction, so glossary entries are not partitioned per jurisdiction the way cards are. schema_version 2 adds 'id' (the term's own stable slug, matching this file's basename) and 'jurisdictions' (which jurisdiction(s) the term applies to -- a jurisdiction id such as 'hk', or 'global' for a regime-independent term); 'related_terms' changed from display-text strings to id references (lowercase, hyphenated, matching each referenced term's own 'id') so links between entries survive term renames.

jurisdictions.description: Jurisdiction id(s) (e.g. 'hk') this term applies to, or 'global' for a regime-independent term.
